title: Category 5 - NoLimits Coaster
description:
This is my 2nd NoLimits Coaster. It's a regular inverted coaster with 3 inversions - one vertical loop, one barrel roll (correct me with a better name), and a dive loop. Comment, rate, and subscribe! ~'~'~'~'~'~'~'

Music Credits - Technical Difficulties by Racer x
